chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-7597 of 2022 Syed Shahbaz Hussain Versus Federation of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.32248/2022. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 06.08.2024 Mr. Wahaj Ali Khan, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel has been instructed not to press this petition which is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
